title: Plutarch, Moralia: That Epicurus Actually Makes a Pleasant Life Impossible
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: That Epicurus Actually Makes a Pleasant Life Impossible.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: That Epicurus Actually Makes a Pleasant Life Impossible.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'That Epicurus Actually Makes a Pleasant Life Impossible': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
